last_prompt: Implement per-task timeout and auto-retry. Add optional fields `timeout_seconds: Option<u64>` and `max_retries: Option<u32>` to the Task struct in core/src/types.rs (with serde defaults of None). In cli/src/ralph_loop.rs, wrap the agent execution call with `tokio::time::timeout` when `timeout_seconds` is set, treating a timeout as a task failure with a clear error message. Add retry logic: if a task fails and its `failed_attempts` count is below `max_retries`, reset its status back to Pending (instead of Failed) so the scheduler picks it up again on the next iteration. Ensure retry counts are persisted to the task file.
